methods.name: send
methods.doc: Publish message to receiver's inbox via bus port.

methods.name: receive
methods.doc: Poll next message for this agent from bus port.

methods.name: ack
methods.doc: Acknowledge message — removed from inflight.

methods.name: nack
methods.doc: Negative-acknowledge — requeue or dead-letter via bus port.

methods.name: peek
methods.doc: Peek at inbox — returns a shallow copy without consuming messages.

methods.name: pending_count
methods.doc: Return count of pending messages in inbox.

methods.name: publish

methods.name: poll
methods.doc: Poll next message for receiver. Thread-safe.

methods.name: ack
methods.doc: Acknowledge message — remove from inflight.

methods.name: nack
methods.doc: Nack message — requeue or dead-letter.

methods.name: pending_count
methods.doc: Return inbox size for receiver.

methods.name: requeue_all_inflight
methods.doc: Requeue ALL inflight messages for a receiver back to inbox.

methods.name: dead_letters
methods.doc: Snapshot of all dead-letter records.

methods.name: get_stats
methods.doc: Return a diagnostic snapshot. Safe to call at any time.

capabilities.description: 从 LLM 输出文本中移除 <SESSION_PATCH> 块，保留纯 visible content。

capabilities.description: 测试 ContinuationPolicy.can_continue 的各种场景。

capabilities.name: TestContinuationPolicyDetectRepetitiveFailure
capabilities.description: 测试 _detect_repetitive_failure 静态方法。

capabilities.description: 测试 _detect_stagnation_v2 静态方法。

methods.name: test_semantic_stagnation_detected
methods.doc: 连续 4 个 turn 的 task_progress 未推进，应判定为语义停滞。

methods.name: test_semantic_stagnation_progress_changes
methods.doc: task_progress 有变化时不应判定为语义停滞。

methods.name: test_semantic_stagnation_not_enough_trajectory
methods.doc: 轨迹不足 4 条时不应触发语义停滞检测。

capabilities.name: TestSessionPatchConfidenceAndSuperseded
capabilities.description: 测试 SessionPatch confidence/superseded 字段（Step 9）。

capabilities.name: TestApplySessionPatchConfidenceAware
capabilities.description: 测试 apply_session_patch 置信度感知合并（Step 9）。

capabilities.name: TestStagnationIntegration
capabilities.description: Stagnation detection integration tests generated by Director CLI live-fire.

methods.name: test_semantic_stagnation_three_same_progress
methods.doc: 连续 4 次 task_progress 不变触发语义停滞（max_trajectory_size=10）。

methods.name: test_hash_stagnation_repeated_hashes
methods.doc: recent_artifact_hashes 连续两次相同触发哈希停滞。

methods.name: test_speculative_hints_prevent_hash_stagnation
methods.doc: speculative_hints 非空时豁免哈希停滞。

methods.name: test_progress_changes_no_semantic_stagnation
methods.doc: task_progress 有变化时不触发语义停滞。

methods.name: test_combined_stagnation_progress_and_hash
methods.doc: 语义停滞 + 哈希停滞同时满足时仍然返回 True。

capabilities.name: TestGetActiveFindings
capabilities.description: 测试 get_active_findings 过滤 superseded 发现物（Step 9）。

capabilities.name: TestSessionArtifactStore
capabilities.description: 测试 SessionArtifactStore 的增量持久化和 diff 行为。

capabilities.name: MockKernel
capabilities.description: Minimal mock kernel that yields a sequence of events.

capabilities.name: TestRoleSessionOrchestrator
capabilities.description: 测试 RoleSessionOrchestrator 的多 Turn 编排循环。

capabilities.name: TestCheckpointResume
capabilities.description: 测试 Checkpoint Resume 加载（Step 10）。

methods.name: test_load_checkpoint_restores_full_state
methods.doc: 验证 _load_checkpoint 完整恢复降维工作记忆。

methods.name: test_load_checkpoint_raises_on_version_mismatch
methods.doc: 验证不支持的 schema_version 抛出 ValueError。

methods.name: test_try_load_checkpoint_silent_on_missing_file
methods.doc: 验证 checkpoint 文件不存在时不崩溃。

methods.name: test_continuation_prompt_excludes_superseded_findings
methods.doc: 验证 4-zone prompt 不包含 superseded 的发现物（Step 9）。

methods.name: test_resume_uses_continuation_prompt_not_original
methods.doc: 验证 checkpoint resume 后使用 continuation prompt 而非原始 prompt（Bug 修复）。

methods.name: test_try_load_checkpoint_corrupted_json_silent_fallback
methods.doc: 验证 checkpoint 文件是非法 JSON 时静默回退到初始状态（防御性设计）。

methods.name: test_try_load_checkpoint_schema_v1_silent_fallback
methods.doc: 验证旧 schema_version=1 的 checkpoint 被静默回退（schema 不兼容防御）。

methods.name: test_try_load_checkpoint_forward_compatible_with_unknown_fields
methods.doc: 验证 checkpoint 包含未来未知字段时仍能正常加载（前向兼容）。
